testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer identity pool overrides allowUnauthenticatedIdentities is escape hatched if guest login is false
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer identity pool overrides allowUnauthenticatedIdentities is escape hatched if guest login is false

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer identity pool overrides cfnIdentityPool is not declared as a const if guest login is true
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer identity pool overrides cfnIdentityPool is not declared as a const if guest login is true

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer AppSync API Generation should set awsRegion to a dynamic value from backend
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer AppSync API Generation should set awsRegion to a dynamic value from backend

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with underscores in name
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with underscores in name

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with partition key and sort key
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with partition key and sort key

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with GSI
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with GSI

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with stream configuration
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should generate table with stream configuration

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should handle multiple tables with different configurations
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should handle multiple tables with different configurations

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should include required CDK imports for DynamoDB
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should include required CDK imports for DynamoDB

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should create storage stack when no S3 bucket exists
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should create storage stack when no S3 bucket exists

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should use existing storage stack when S3 bucket exists
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB table generation should use existing storage stack when S3 bucket exists

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer Table name transformation should replace multiple hyphens with underscores
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer Table name transformation should replace multiple hyphens with underscores

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer Table name transformation should handle table names without hyphens
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer Table name transformation should handle table names without hyphens

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB Triggers should generate escape hatches for DynamoDB triggers
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer DynamoDB Triggers should generate escape hatches for DynamoDB triggers

testcase.classname: BackendSynthesizer REST API should generate IAM policies for both auth and group permissions
testcase.name: BackendSynthesizer REST API should generate IAM policies for both auth and group permissions
